description.value:
High-peak wardmarks from stormwatchers — Skjoldfjellsmål stormwatchers live in the high crags where lightning strikes daily; over generations they developed wardmarks that cause bolts and thunderclaps to slide off a warded surface rather than strike it.

Effect: You have lightning immunity 10 and sonic immunity 10. Once per respite, when you would be hit by a critical hit, treat it as a normal hit instead.

Rules: Damage Immunity; Critical Hit; Respite.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of exceptional quality; a fragment of storm-fused rock from the Skjoldfjellet peaks
